slides.headline: A heat pump installer we work with was buried in enquiries that went nowhere.
slides.body: Grants bring a flood of callers. Most don't qualify. Swipe.

slides.headline: Every call ate 20 minutes.
slides.body: Explaining grants, checking the basics — and most weren't ready or didn't qualify.

slides.headline: The genuine, ready-to-go customers got lost in the noise.
slides.body: Buried under price-shoppers and 'just wondering' calls.

slides.headline: We set up a system that answers and qualifies up front.
slides.body: Checks the basics, books the real ones, politely filters the rest — before it ever reaches him.

slides.headline: He spends his day on installs — not explaining grants for the tenth time.
Wasting hours on tyre-kickers?
slides.save: Save this if enquiries eat your day
